inspired_by_benchmarks: WildChat-1M; LMSYS-Chat-1M; BurstGPT; Azure LLM Inference Trace 2023/2024; LMSYS Chatbot Arena; ShareGPT

Load RAGBench q+4-doc rows; hash document set into prefix-cache groups; fire under Poisson to test prefix-aware vs prefix-blind routing

inspired_by_benchmarks: LongBench v2; LongBench; L-Eval; NarrativeQA; Natural Questions
input_token_dist: 5000-2000000 MEASURED (LongBench v2 up to 2M words; L-Eval 3k-200k; NarrativeQA ~41k; NQ full Wikipedia page)
output_token_dist: 1-1000 (LongBench v2 MCQ=1 letter MEASURED; QA answers 5-50 MEASURED)
min_first_impl: Stream LongBench-v2 + L-Eval contexts bucketed by length (<32k/32k-128k/>128k) under synthesized arrivals to test length-aware admission and OOM avoidance

inspired_by_benchmarks: arXiv summarization; PubMed summarization; GovReport; MultiNews; BookSum

min_first_impl: Replay arXiv/PubMed input+target lengths under synthesized arrivals with a TPOT SLO to test co-scheduling long decode without prefill starvation
Group RepoBench rows by repo_name; route same-repo completions to one node under high-rate synthesized arrivals; measure prefix-cache hit rate vs round-robin

inspired_by_benchmarks: SWE-bench; SWE-bench Verified; SWE-bench Pro; SWE-Lancer
input_token_dist: 2000-50000 ESTIMATE (repo+issue; SWE-bench Pro problem_statement 419-8.04k chars MEASURED)
real_traces_exist: no (static tasks; harness must generate trace)
min_first_impl: Run SWE-agent on SWE-bench Verified (500 tasks); log per-turn (input_len,output_len,task_id) for monotonic-KV traces; route by task_id stickiness

inspired_by_benchmarks: WebArena (text DOM/AX-tree); VisualWebArena (multimodal); OSWorld (multimodal VM); WorkArena (gated)

synthetic_required: yes (arrivals + harness/VM; multimodal adds image-token channel)
min_first_impl: Start with WebArena text (no VM): generate per-step (DOM_len,action_len,episode_id) traces from raw prompt observations; route by episode_id; add multimodal image-token channel later

inspired_by_benchmarks: MMLU; MMLU-Pro; GSM8K; MATH; HumanEval; MBPP; BBH; Big-Bench; HELM; lm-evaluation-harness; LiveCodeBench; BigCodeBench

inspired_by_benchmarks: Mooncake Trace; BurstGPT; Azure LLM Inference Trace 2023/2024; Azure Functions Trace 2019 (arrival donor); Alibaba GenAI GenTD26 (LoRA IDs)
input_token_dist: varies-MEASURED (Mooncake input_length; BurstGPT Request tokens; Azure ContextTokens)
output_token_dist: varies-MEASURED (Mooncake output_length; BurstGPT Response tokens; Azure GeneratedTokens)
arrival_pattern: bursty (real production; Azure Functions 2019 as burstiness donor)
prefix_reuse: high (Mooncake hash_ids ~50% hit - only public prefix-hash trace)
real_traces_exist: yes (4 real arrival traces form backbone)
synthetic_required: yes (overlay tenant tiers + SLO classes + tool structure)
min_first_impl: Replay BurstGPT (arrivals+sessions) and Mooncake (arrivals+prefix hash_ids) as backbones; assign synthetic tenant tiers + SLO classes per session; evaluate joint stickiness + prefix-locality + tenant fairness
